01 = Unable to prepare light meals on a regular basis due to physical, cognitive, or mental limitations.
02 = Unable to prepare any light meals or reheat any delivered meals. CHAR 2 x x x x
M1890_CU_PHONE_USE M1890 (M0770) Current Phone Use This field indicates the patient's current ability to answer the phone safely, including dialing numbers, and effectively using the telephone to communicate.
